name: STEVEN MADDEN, LTD.
summary: Steven Madden, Ltd. is a footwear and accessories company that designs, sources, markets, and sells fashion-forward shoes, handbags, and accessories under owned and licensed brands. The company operates through wholesale and retail channels, serving consumers globally. Its portfolio includes owned brands and licensed products, with recent expansion via the acquisition of Kurt Geiger, a UK-based footwear and accessories brand.
